collection_notes: Google Play may limit the number of retrievable reviews; this script targets a configurable count and stops when no continuation token is available.

cleaning_decisions.deduplication: Remove duplicates by identical cleaned text.
cleaning_decisions.drop_empty: Drop reviews that become empty after cleaning.
cleaning_decisions.drop_extremely_short: Drop reviews with <= 3 tokens after cleaning.
cleaning_decisions.remove_punctuation: Remove punctuation by replacing non-alphanumeric characters with spaces.
cleaning_decisions.numbers_to_text: Convert digit sequences to words using num2words when available; otherwise keep digits.
cleaning_decisions.whitespace_normalization: Collapse multiple whitespace to single spaces; trim ends.
cleaning_decisions.stopwords: Remove English stopwords using sklearn ENGLISH_STOP_WORDS (offline-friendly).
cleaning_decisions.lemmatization: Use WordNet lemmatizer if locally available; otherwise use Porter stemmer as an offline-friendly proxy.
